description: First Automation Anywhere (A360) corpus sample: a nightly invoice-loading bot with a table loop, a high-value branch calling a separate approval task, a legacy terminal command (unmapped on purpose), and three planted issues: a runtime password startup parameter (SEC-002), a hardcoded UNC source path (SEC-004), and no error handler at all (REL-001). Proves the vendor-neutral IR: rules, summaries, and conversion run unchanged.
notes: The terminalEmulatorConnect command is deliberately unmapped: it must surface as a generic stage plus exactly one parse warning (never silently dropped). runTask targets are external bots — conversion punch-lists them honestly rather than inventing workflows.
